title: Install tree protection devices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install tree protection devices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install

pcs.text: Read work instructions relating to installation of tree protection devices and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read work instructions relating to installation of tree protection devices and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read work instructions relating to installation of tree protection devices and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to the supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to the supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to the supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify manual handling and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify manual handling and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify manual handling and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify trees to be protected, and method of protection to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify trees to be protected, and method of protection to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify trees to be protected, and method of protection to be used.

pcs.text: Collect protection devices or materials to assemble devices and check requirements according to tree protection plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect protection devices or materials to assemble devices and check requirements according to tree protection plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect protection devices or materials to assemble devices and check requirements according to tree protection plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install

elements.title: Install protection devices

pcs.text: Assemble, fit and secure tree protection devices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble, fit and secure tree protection devices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble, fit and secure tree protection devices.

pcs.text: Carry out work in a manner that minimises risk of damage to trees and environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out work in a manner that minimises risk of damage to trees and environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out work in a manner that minimises risk of damage to trees and environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Install protection devices

elements.title: Complete installation activities

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check protection devices for effectiveness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check protection devices for effectiveness.

pcs.text: Report damaged and ineffective devices to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report damaged and ineffective devices to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report damaged and ineffective devices to supervisor.

pcs.text: Maintain a clean and safe area throughout and on completion of work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a clean and safe area throughout and on completion of work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a clean and safe area throughout and on completion of work.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor.
